case_title: CHI FAI LI VS. SAMSOM WEI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY LI, CHI FAI AS TO DEFENDANT WEI, SAMSOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER *MUST ATTEND 12/1/21 TO BE HEARD*
(SC-105)-REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT WEI, SAMSOM

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. STATUE OF LIMITATAIONS EXPIRED. PLAINTIFF CHI FAI LI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT SAMSOM WEI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
